_comment_grid_dims: Grid dimensions (15x15=225) for point datasets like METR_LA (207 nodes). The model will pad/reshape point data to fit the grid. For true grid datasets, adjust grid_height and grid_width to match the dataset's spatial structure.
_comment_model_size: Using 'small' configuration for memory efficiency. For better performance with sufficient GPU memory, try 'middle' (embed_dim=128, depth=6) or refer to the original paper for large configurations.
_comment_pretrained: Set pretrained_weights to path of pre-trained checkpoint for transfer learning. Leave as null for training from scratch.
